overall.description: A static cinematic shot from a video game (Hogwarts Legacy) showing the Gryffindor common room. The scene features a warm, fire-lit interior with medieval Gothic architecture, red tapestries, wooden beams, and students in robes walking through or relaxing on furniture. The camera remains completely stationary throughout the clip, capturing the cozy atmosphere of the castle interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval castle common room with central fireplace

agents.ego_description: standing still near the fireplace, observing the common room and other students moving through the space

notable_agents.action: student sitting on the red velvet couch reading a book
student in dark robes walking from the archway toward the right side of the room

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with active fire burning, serving as the focal point of the room
tall red walls adorned with hanging tapestries and medieval banners
exposed dark wooden beams and rafters supporting the high ceiling
plush red velvet couch with students seated on it
ornate brass chandelier with multiple lit candles hanging from the ceiling
gothic stone archway leading to other parts of the castle
large oil painting in a gold frame hanging on the red wall
antique table lamp with a green glass shade on a wooden side table
potted plants and greenery arranged against the right wall

segments.scene_description: A static view of a medieval Gothic common room centered on a burning stone fireplace. The warm artificial lighting from the fire and lamps illuminates red tapestried walls and wooden ceiling beams. Students in dark robes are scattered throughout—some sitting on a red velvet couch to the left, others walking through the stone archway in the background. The camera remains stationary, capturing the cozy, fire-lit atmosphere of the castle interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, atmospheric view of a medieval Gothic common room that maintains a consistent sense of warmth and scholarly tranquility. It begins centered on a burning stone fireplace, where the flickering orange light casts a glow across red tapestried walls and heavy wooden ceiling beams. As the eye wanders through the space, the warm artificial lighting from nearby lamps illuminates students in dark robes relaxing on a red velvet couch to the left. The scene then expands toward the background, where figures move quietly through a stone archway, further grounding the cozy interior of the castle. Finally, the camera lingers on the interplay of light and shadow, preserving the still and inviting mood of the room.
